title: The J.M. Smucker Co. to Report Second Quarter Earnings and Announces Webcast of 2022 Investor Day
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio , Oct. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) will release its second quarter fiscal 2023 financial results on Monday, November 21, 2022.

title: J.M. Smucker Still Looks Appetizing
text: Smucker has seen better-than-expected inelasticity in the face of double-digit price increases, as customers remain loyal to its coffee, spread, sandwich, and pet food brands. Margin leverage could be an underappreciated tailwind in the coming year or two, as inflation costs appear to be easing and Smucker has held on to market share.

title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Gains on Solid Pricing, Coffee Business
text: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) has been benefiting from strength in the coffee business, a focus on core strategies, a revival in the Away from Home division and pricing amid cost inflation and supply-chain woes.

title: Food Inflation Props These Stocks During Market Correction
text: Packaged food stocks are performing well compared to the broader market ahead of upcoming earnings reports from industry leaders. The post Food Inflation Props These Stocks During Market Correction appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.
